opportunities.why_this_fits: WK Kellogg Foundation has a track record of supporting organizations like Horizons National Student Enrichment Program Inc.. Notably, BATTLE CREEK PUBLIC SCHOOLS received $4,650,000 in 2023 for: Early Care and Education Programs
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (92%). Consider requesting $80,000 - $150,000 based on their $100,000 median grant. With a 58% repeat funding rate, plan for multi-year relationship building.
